title: Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple
tagline: Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Eengoimalai in Trichy district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Eengoimalai in Trichy district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Maragadachaleswarar and Eengoinathar. His consort is Maragadambikai.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Manamedu Trichy
topPlaces.description: Manamedu is a village in Thottiyam taluk in the district of Tiruchirapalli (Trichy) with population of roughly 13,500 people. Land ruling community saliyar are land lord and powerful ruling community in Manamedu.

topPlaces.name: Inootrumangalam
topPlaces.description: Inootrumangalam is a village in Karur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is part of the K. Pettai panchayat and belongs to the Kulithalai sub district.

topPlaces.name: Appananallur
topPlaces.description: Appananallur is a village in Thottiyam Taluk in the Tiruchirappalli district of the Tamil Nadu State in India. The village is inhabited by 1482 families, with a population of 5610, with 2792 males and 2818 females per the 2011 Census of India.

topPlaces.name: Musiri
topPlaces.description: Musiri is a town in the Tiruchirappalli district in the India state of Tamil Nadu. It has an average elevation of 82 metres (269 feet).

topPlaces.name: Musiri taluk
topPlaces.description: Musiri taluk is a taluk of Tiruchirapalli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Musiri.

topPlaces.name: Thottiyam
topPlaces.description: Thottiyam is a Selection Grade Nagar Panchayat and Taluk in Tiruchirappalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is situated 60 km north-west of Tiruchirapalli on Tiruchy-Namakkal State Highway (SH-25) and further it connects Namakkal-Salem-Bangalore National Highway (NH 7).

topPlaces.name: Tirumayanam Brahmapureeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tirumayanam Brahmapureeswarar Temple( திருமயானம் பிரம்மபுரீஸ்வரர் கோயில்])is a Hindu temple located at Tirumayanam in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Thottiyam taluk
topPlaces.description: Thottiyam taluk is a taluk of Tiruchirapalli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is in the town of Thottiyam.

items.note: Manamedu is a village in Thottiyam taluk in the district of Tiruchirapalli (Trichy) with population of roughly 13,500 people. Land ruling community saliyar are land lord and powerful ruling community in Manamedu.

Appananallur is a village in Thottiyam Taluk in the Tiruchirappalli district of the Tamil Nadu State in India. The village is inhabited by 1482 families, with a population of 5610, with 2792 males and 2818 females per the 2011 Census of India.

Thottiyam is a Selection Grade Nagar Panchayat and Taluk in Tiruchirappalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is situated 60 km north-west of Tiruchirapalli on Tiruchy-Namakkal State Highway (SH-25) and further it connects Namakkal-Salem-Bangalore National Highway (NH 7).
Tirumayanam Brahmapureeswarar Temple( திருமயானம் பிரம்மபுரீஸ்வரர் கோயில்])is a Hindu temple located at Tirumayanam in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thiruengoimalai Maragadachaleswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manamedu Trichy, Inootrumangalam, Appananallur, Musiri, Musiri taluk.
